_description: SORT1 cis-pQTL in plasma, UKB-PPP European (discovery), N ~46,673: the protein-side companion to the canonical 1p13.3 LDL/CHD locus (Musunuru 2010). Pairs with cholesterol-VLDL on the GWAS side. Forms the SORT1 dual-modality demo (eQTL + pQTL exposure) per the v1.3 multi-modality demo plan.
